fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the sent notification entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the sent notification was made, such as by email.

fields.name: Recipient User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who received the sent notification.

fields.name: Created Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the sent notification was created.

fields.name: Created By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who created the notification.

fields.name: Sent Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the notification was sent.

fields.name: Notification Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the notification was sent by email or as a note.

fields.name: Aggregated with Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the other sent approval entry that this approval entry is aggregated with.
